name: @kestrel-agents/next
description: Next.js integration helpers for Kestrel agents

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('.tmp-pack', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kestrel-agents/sdk build && pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.smoke:import: node --input-type=module -e "import('./dist/index.js').then(({ createJsonRunRouteHandler, readRequestCorrelation }) => { void createJsonRunRouteHandler; void readRequestCorrelation; })"
